reasoning: Forecast based on FRED series analysis showing decreasing trend in cash assets from July 2025 peak (3427) to November 5 low (2890.56). Resolution requires comparing each date independently to the baseline (2890.56, value on 2025-11-05 as proxy). Short-term probability (2025-11-16) moderately positive at 60% due to statistical model estimate despite downward momentum. Medium-term (2025-12-09) at 57% with uncertainty about year-end seasonal effects. Long-term (2026-02-07) at 54% as forecast horizon increases uncertainty and probability converges to 0.5 baseline.
